rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks to contain AGREE syntax elements like assume, guarantee, eq, and assign.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE variables are grounded in visible AADL identifiers or explicit declarations.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Use component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are present.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports or declared variables.
Implementation-level assignments belong in implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL property names directly as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
